data.description: Your weapon disappears if it is more than 5 feet away from you for a minute or more. If you use your feature to dismiss the weapon, no action is required. The weapon ceases to exist in your physical space and can reappear when you need it. If you serve the Fiend, your weapon could be an axe made of black metal and adorned with decorative flames. If your patron is the Great Old One, your weapon might be a slender blade wrapped in leafy vines or an ancient-looking spear with a gemstone embedded in its head that looks like a terrible unblinking eye.

This section introduces Otherworldly Patrons, which are other allies and The Archfey including Prince Frost, Queen Air Darkness, Titania of the Summer Court, Oberon, Green Hyrsam, and ancient hags. It also mentions that these patrons can provide magical or grudge-based power.
